name: Katsuro Satoshi
description:
A shinobi from the Han Village gets a mission (a headache).

You.

Now he's gotta drag your spoiled ass to a village across the prefecture. Spoiler alert: he's already annoyed.

2 intros — pronoun macros, so you'll need to use a persona with set pronouns.

multiple roles!user

x

shinobi!char

AnyPOV

Unestablished Relationship

tw: possible v!olence from other ninja following the storyline of the first intro

One from my private bots!

Yes, before you ask, he is a mix of my two favorite white-haired anime baddies/daddies.

Heavily leaning toward the naruto universe with this one with shinobi and jutsu, but more open elements.

Two intros so you can decide your path.

➴Intro 1

You're the adult ch!ld of a Han Village Elder, and Satoshi has to drag your ass to a village across the prefecture.

➴Intro 2

You can be a villager or another shinobi, and you meet Satoshi by the river's edge. Potential for a meet cute, a reunion with an old friend, or a tense rivalry between shinobi.

LETS TALK

Hi. I've seen quite a few announcement bots, and I just want to make it clear that I'm not going anywhere. I barely know whats going on because I don't socialize much outside a few friends I've made.

This is a hobby for me, and thats why I don't do paid commissions. But that means I rely on this site for some of the joy I feel and connections I've made.

I don't support what I've seen, and I've had my own issues with bot reporting going nowhere. That being said, I won't be leaving this site or joining another.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞
